# getascraper/how-to-scrape-kaspi

> Kaspi Product Scraper is an Apify Actor that extracts products, prices, Kaspi bonus, installments, ratings, and stock from Kaspi.kz. Free tier available.

## Overview
- Kaspi.kz scraper and product data extraction API
- Extracts: price, Kaspi bonus price, installments, rating, stock, delivery
- Output formats: JSON, CSV, Excel, XML, RSS
- Free tier: included

## Key Pages
- README: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-kaspi/blob/main/README.md
- Apify Store: https://apify.com/getascraper/kaspi-product-scraper
- Apify Console: https://console.apify.com/actors/getascraper~kaspi-product-scraper
- Source Actor: https://github.com/getascraper/actorstack/tree/main/actors/kaspi-product-scraper

## How it works
1. Add search keywords in Russian or Kazakh, or direct Kaspi search URLs
2. Pick a city so prices, Kaspi bonus, and stock match that market
3. The actor collects every matching product and writes one flat row per item

## Target site characteristics
- Public product catalog data from Kaspi.kz, Kazakhstan's leading marketplace
- Up to 24 top-relevance products returned per search keyword
- Covers 6 cities: Almaty, Astana, Shymkent, Karaganda, Aktobe, Aktau

## API Usage
- Node.js SDK: https://docs.apify.com/api/client/js
- REST API: https://docs.apify.com/api/v2
- MCP server: https://github.com/apify/apify-mcp-server

## Supported target URLs
- https://kaspi.kz/shop/search/?text=<keyword>
- https://kaspi.kz/shop/

## Pricing
- Free tier: included
- Paid: $0.88 per 1,000 results

## Output schema (highlights)
- price: Current price in tenge
- priceWithBonus: Price after Kaspi bonus deduction
- monthlyInstallment: Monthly installment amount
- rating / reviewsQuantity: Customer rating and review count
- inStock / stockCount: Availability and units in stock
- deliveryDuration: Delivery speed

## Use cases
- Reseller checking live Kaspi market prices before setting their own
- Retail researcher comparing pricing and assortment across Kazakhstan cities
- Brand owner monitoring their products' prices, ratings, and stock on Kaspi
- Developer feeding live Kaspi.kz data into a price or deals database

## Support
- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-kaspi/issues
- Apify Console: https://console.apify.com/actors/getascraper~kaspi-product-scraper/issues
